description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a natural wood grain finish. The front side displays a combination of horizontal drawers on the right and open shelving with pull-out trays on the left, providing both concealed and accessible storage. The cabinet sits on a slightly recessed base, giving it a floating appearance. The sides and back are solid panels with a continuous wood grain pattern, and there are no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism. The open shelving section is divided into several horizontal compartments, ideal for organizing documents or flat items. The overall construction appears sturdy and well-crafted, suitable for use in offices, lobbies, or upscale urban interiors.
description: A modern wooden cabinet with multiple drawers and open shelves, finished in natural wood grain. It features a sleek, handleless design and a recessed base.
description_view_0: Front view showing six horizontal drawers on the right and four open shelves with pull-out trays on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid wood panel with visible grain, no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous, unbroken wood panel with no visible drawers or shelves.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid wood panel, mirroring the left side, and no visible features.
